message:
test(pt-core): add no-mock coverage for beta_stacy and logging layer

beta_stacy.rs: 37 new tests (4→41) covering BetaParams, BinningScheme
(fixed/log), BetaStacyBin posterior/hazard, BetaStacyModel lifecycle,
survival curve properties, error display, BinSpec, LifetimeSample.

logging/layer.rs: 21 new tests (1→22) covering guess_field_class all
field-name mappings, SpanContext default, JsonFieldVisitor, JsonlLayer
construction, full layer event recording with buffer writer pattern.

bead: process_triage-aii.7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
